descriptionInUI: The player TARPS film system (MOOSE TARS) only works for a human in the recon slot, so AI-flown recon flights never confirmed any battle-damage assessment. This records BDA for an AI recon flight (player coalition) that survives to overfly its target: when the flight closes within range of the target, the enemy ground units there are written into the same recon ledger the player film menu feeds, so the campaign fog-of-war lifts on what the AI recon photographed. A recon flight shot down or aborting before the target confirms nothing. Inert unless the mission has AI recon flights.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Overfly range that triggers the photo capture (NM)
Radius around the target whose enemy units are captured (NM)
Max units captured per recon flight
